caption: A woman with short blonde hair wearing a dark blue shirt is featured in a small circular inset window, while the main scene shows a close-up of a large metal bowl filled with popcorn. Some of the popcorn is naturally white, while other pieces are colored green and blue. A hand is visible, stirring and mixing the colorful popcorn within the bowl. In the upper-left corner of the scene, the logo and text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" are displayed. As the sequence progresses, the hand continues to toss and move the popcorn, causing the white and colored pieces to shift positions. The woman in the inset remains in the same position, watching the process. The background behind the main bowl is blurred, and a light blue sky with white clouds is visible in the upper corners of the frame.
